overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded character exploring a rooftop terrace in historic Baghdad, followed by cinematic aerial shots circling the Prince's Palace situated on a river. The video transitions from ground-level third-person exploration to sweeping drone views showcasing Islamic architecture and palace gardens.

moving from covered pavilion area to open terrace edge with panoramic city view

figure walking in the distance across the rooftop

light-colored stone tiles with decorative patterns

tall date palm visible above the terrace level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rooftop terrace in historic Baghdad, where a hooded character walks past a blue canopy pavilion. The character turns left and proceeds along the stone pavement, passing an astronomical observatory instrument and approaching the terrace edge with views of the city beyond. A few robed NPCs stand scattered around the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of palace complex on river island

events.description: text overlay 'Prince's Palace' appears on screen identifying the location
camera descends from high aerial view to medium height near water level
camera circles to reveal the city-side approach and wooden dock structure

agents.ego_description: aerial camera circling the palace complex, showcasing the architecture and gardens from multiple angles

entered.detail: large stone palace with multiple domes and Islamic architectural details situated on a river island
prominent turquoise dome on the central palace building
wide river surrounding the palace island with gentle currents
lush greenery and flowering trees within the palace walls
dense urban fabric of historic Baghdad extending to the horizon
small pier structure extending into the river for boat access
sandy desert landscape visible beyond the city in the distance

segments.scene_description: Following a fade to black, the video transitions to sweeping aerial cinematography of the Prince's Palace. The camera circles the magnificent stone complex with its distinctive blue dome, showcasing the lush gardens, surrounding river, and wooden dock. The text 'Prince's Palace' appears as the camera descends from high altitude to water level, revealing the desert dunes beyond the city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a historic rooftop terrace in Baghdad, transitioning from an intimate architectural space to an expansive urban vista. It begins by following a hooded character as they walk past a blue canopy pavilion on the stone pavement. As the character turns left, the camera glides past an astronomical observatory instrument and several scattered robed figures. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches the terrace edge, finally revealing the sprawling city skyline stretching out beyond the rooftop.

The shot follows a sweeping aerial trajectory that descends from a high-altitude overview of a royal estate down to the water's edge. It begins with a wide, circling motion around the Prince's Palace, highlighting the magnificent stone complex and its distinctive blue dome. As the camera glides lower, the view expands to encompass the lush palace gardens, the surrounding river, and a wooden dock. The scene then shifts its focus toward the horizon, revealing the distant desert dunes beyond the city skyline before finally settling at water level.
